mapper.sql: id, invoice_no, ro_id, receive_type, do_id, pco_id, order_id, order_item, split_item_no, status, cre_time, creator, batch_no, invoice_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log (id, invoice_no, ro_id, receive_type, do_id, pco_id, order_id, order_item, split_item_no, status, cre_time, creator, batch_no, invoice_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

id,
invoice_no,
ro_id,
receive_type,
do_id,
pco_id,
order_id,
order_item,
split_item_no,

cre_time,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receive_type = #{record.receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_item_no = #{record.splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
batch_no = #{record.batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_type = #{record.receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_item_no = #{record.splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, batch_no = #{record.batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
receive_type = #{receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_item_no = #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
batch_no = #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_ro_confirm_log set invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_type = #{receiveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_item_no = #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, batch_no = #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
